nodes.label: AI as verification-requiring tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as opaque black box without understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I get to learn the *how* and *why* behind any type of new concept I come across, and get to verify that I truly understand it

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for personal and creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it was saving me a few hours a week by avoiding monotonous tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure to recognize obvious patterns
nodes.grounding_span: the model absolutely insists that it cannot find a pattern

nodes.label: AI as junior colleague with mistakes
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous and error-free
nodes.grounding_span: I see it as a junior colleague that will make mistakes

nodes.label: Personal domain reserved from AI
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing emails in my own personality, and almost never outsource any administrative writing to AI

nodes.label: Enjoyment of 'nerdier' technical challenges
nodes.label_negative: Delegating enjoyable technical work to AI
nodes.grounding_span: getting to enjoy the 'nerdier' aspects of my work is huge for me

nodes.label: Deep understanding and mastery
nodes.grounding_span: I get to learn the *how* and *why* behind any type of new concept

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saving me a few hours a week by avoiding monotonous tasks

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing emails in my own personality

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I get to learn the *how* and *why* behind any type of new concept

nodes.label: Frustration with AI pattern recognition failures
nodes.grounding_span: the model absolutely insists that it cannot find a pattern

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely optimistic, yet realistic about its growth

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in interpersonal tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing emails in my own personality, and almost never outsource any administrative writing to AI

nodes.label: Methodical step-by-step verification
nodes.grounding_span: I first tend to go step-by-step with it, then after I feel I understand the process correctly, I'll calculate new SPC numbers...then feed that data to an AI model to verify

nodes.label: Role evolution from developer to engineer
nodes.grounding_span: I'm more of a software engineer now, than a software developer. I work more on the 'bigger picture' and let AI do some of the smaller details
